author: polariscampus
text:
Just 10 Days to Go!
The countdown has begun.
Only 10 days remain to take the Polaris Aptitude Test (PAT) and secure your chance to become an All India Polaris Scholar.
Compete with the brightest minds across the country for:
 - ₹2 Lakhs each for the Top 3 scholars
 - MacBooks for the Next 7 scholars
The opportunity won’t wait forever.
Register to take the PAT today & build a better future.
#AIPS #AllIndiaPolarisScholarship #PAT #PolarisAptitudeTest #Scholarship

author: polariscampus
text:
Kids These Days Episode 13

Google Assistant and Siri send your voice to company servers.

Sameer and Sachin built Orvyn, an Android assistant that runs on your phone and keeps your voice private.

author: thepolarisfellowship
text:
@bainandcompany joins The Polaris Fellowship as an Ecosystem Partner. 🤝

One of the world’s “Big Three” strategy consulting firms, Bain generates over $7.5 billion in annual revenue and pioneered the Net Promoter Score (NPS) - the customer loyalty framework now used by companies across the globe.

For decades, Bain has helped some of the world’s most influential businesses solve complex strategic challenges, drive transformation, and build category-defining companies.

We’re excited to welcome Bain & Company to the growing Polaris Fellowship ecosystem, alongside founders, operators, investors, and some of the country’s most ambitious technology companies.

#ThePolarisFellowship #BainAndCompany #Startup

author: polariscampus
text:
There are educators who teach AI. And then there are people who’ve spent two decades actually building it - at Amazon, at Deloitte, across engineering teams in India, Europe and beyond.
Polaris is proud to welcome Jayesh Golatkar as a visiting faculty for Applied AI.
Here’s what makes it more special - Jayesh spent over five years as a Software Development Manager at Amazon, leading engineering teams at one of the most technically demanding organisations in the world. Before that, he was AVP of Product Development at Deloitte India and spent over seven years at SAP BusinessObjects in Paris leading cross-site engineering, driving integration between the SAP and BusinessObjects ecosystems, and becoming a certified Product Standard Expert responsible for signing off product quality across multiple programmes. He started building and leading teams in 1999. He hasn’t stopped since.
Today he’s Co-Founder and CTO at Chitragupta Urban Tech, working at the intersection of Computer Vision, Machi

author: polariscampus
text:
1L+ students have already taken the first step. Have you? 

The Polaris Aptitude Test (PAT) is underway, and 1 Lakh students have already entered the race for the All India Polaris Scholarship (AIPS).

This is more than just an aptitude test - it’s your chance to showcase your potential, bring your ideas to life, and compete for rewards worth striving for:

- Top 3 scholars receive ₹2 Lakhs each
- Next 7 scholars win a MacBook

Take the PAT. Make your mark.
#AIPS #AllIndiaPolarisScholarship #PAT #PolarisAptitudeTest #FutureBuilders Scholarship Innovation Students TechEducation

author: thepolarisfellowship
text:
Vultr joins The Polaris Fellowship as an Ecosystem Partner. 🤝🏻

Vultr, headquartered in Florida, USA, is the world’s largest privately held cloud computing platform, uniquely scaling to a $3.5 billion valuation without raising outside equity capital for over a decade. 

Today, it powers 1.5+ million customers across 185 countries, having deployed 80+ million cloud servers worldwide - making enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure faster, simpler, and more accessible while helping developers, startups, and AI builders scale products globally.

We’re excited to welcome Vultr to the growing Polaris Fellowship ecosystem, alongside founders, operators, investors, and some of the country’s most ambitious technology companies.

#ThePolarisFellowship #Ai #Vultr #Startup #StartupIndia

author: polariscampus
text:
Kids These Days Episode 12

Finding hackathon teammates should not take hours of asking around.

Soumya and Shravani built GitTogether, a swipe app that matches coders using their real GitHub projects and tech stack.

author: thepolarisfellowship
text:
@wisprflowindia / @wisprflow joins The Polaris Fellowship as a Productivity Partner, and they’re not just here to shake hands, they’re here to give back to the community. 🤝

We want you to experience the seamless power of voice-to-text. Use these handy tips to be one among our lucky ten:

1) To enter the contest, you must follow The Polaris Fellowship, like this post, and comment your answers.

2) Tag 2 friends in the comments to be eligible.

3) A total of 10 winners will be selected across LinkedIn, X, and Instagram combined.

#ThePolarisFellowship #WisprFlow #Ai #ContestAlert #Startup

author: polariscampus
text:
Getting the ₹2 lakh scholarship or a MacBook starts with one application.

We broke down the full process step by step so you do not miss anything.

author: thepolarisfellowship
text:
@emergentlabs joins The Polaris Fellowship as an Ecosystem Partner. 🤝🏻

Emergent, based in Bengaluru, is one of the world’s fastest-growing AI startups with a record of taking their Annual Recurring Revenue from $50 million to $100 million in just 30 days. 

Emergent is pioneering the “vibe coding” movement, enabling anyone to build production-ready applications simply by chatting with AI. Making product creation faster, more accessible, and no longer limited by the ability to code.

We’re excited to welcome Emergent to the growing Polaris Fellowship ecosystem, alongside founders, operators, investors, and some of the country’s most ambitious technology companies.

#ThePolarisFellowship #Ai #Tech #Startup

author: polariscampus
text:
Kids These Days Episode 11

A college exam made Anant write code on paper.

So he built a platform where colleges can finally test code by actually running it.

No handwriting. No guessing. Just real code.

author: thepolarisfellowship
text:
@fam.india joins The Polaris Fellowship as an Ecosystem Partner.🤝🏻

Trusted by over 10 million users and backed by some of the world’s leading investors including Google, Elevation Capital, and Accel, Fam has become one of India’s fastest-growing consumer fintech companies in recent years.

From launching India’s first numberless card to products like prepaid cards, UPI payments, and more specially for Gen Z, they’re upping the bar on how young India interacts with money.

We’re excited to welcome Fam to the growing Polaris Fellowship ecosystem, alongside founders, operators, investors, and some of the country’s most ambitious technology companies.

#ThePolarisFellowship #Ai #Tech #Startup

author: thepolarisfellowship
text:
@sarvam.ai_official joins The Polaris Fellowship as a Productivity Partner. 🤝🏻

Headquartered in Bengaluru, Sarvam AI is one of India’s leading frontier AI companies, holding a notable estimated 30% share of India’s enterprise-grade Indic Large Language Model (LLM) market, and is valued at $1.5 billion.

In other words, they’re rapidly switching up the AI game in the country, with world-class research, multilingual models, and technology designed for India’s scale.

We’re excited to welcome Sarvam AI to the growing Polaris Fellowship ecosystem, alongside founders, operators, investors, and some of the country’s most ambitious technology companies.

#ThePolarisFellowship #Ai #startup #technology #IndianStartups

author: thepolarisfellowship
text:
10,000+ applications? You kept us rolling, and honestly, we’re floored!We’re genuinely humbled by the response. ❤️

We’re going through every single one, personally, line by line. No skimming, no shortcuts, promise.

So keep those 📩 open, updates coming your way soon.

This is just the start. Follow @thepolarisfellowship for India’s biggest student fellowship 🔥

[Polaris School of Technology, The Polaris Fellowship, technology, coding, Ai, entrepreneurship, startup, tech enthusiasts]

author: polariscampus
text:
College fees should never decide your future.

If you’re an engineering student, this scholarship could cover up to ₹2 lakh of your education.

Applications close soon. Comment SCHOLARSHIP and we’ll send you the details.

author: polariscampus
text: From taking a drop year and facing doubts from people around him to earning a prestigious LFX Mentorship with a $3,000 stipend, Divakar Sharma’s journey is proof that consistency beats criticism. His story shows how the right mentors, supportive friends, and the courage to keep trying can completely change your future. If you’re a student wondering whether it’s worth starting, this is your sign to take that first step.

author: engineeringdigest.in
text: Video by Vipul Tyagi on June 27, 2026. May be a selfie of one or more people, beard, eyeglasses, screen and text that says '2026 Btech'.

author: polariscampus
text:
Wherever you’re starting your B.Tech in 2026, we will BACK YOU! 🌠

Introducing the All India Polaris Scholarship.

Ten students, selected from across the country, backed at the very beginning of their BTech journey with something real.

Rank 1 to 3 win ₹2,00,000 each - cash they can use however their journey demands. Fees, tools, courses, breathing room. You name it.

Rank 4 to 10 win a MacBook each - the most powerful laptop in the world, theirs from day one of engineering college.

Here’s how it works:
 → Register for the Polaris Aptitude Test before 15th July
 → Top 500 write a scholarship essay
 → Top 50 move to a video interview
 → 10 winners. 3 get ₹2 lakh. 7 get a MacBook.

If you’re starting BTech in 2026 and are serious about building a future for yourself, registration link for the Polaris Aptitude Test (PAT) is in the comments and in our bio. Apply now!

🧷Link in BIO & COMMENTS! 

#AllIndiaPolaris Scholarship #Polaris #EngineeringIndia #BTech2026 #Scholarship

author: polariscampus
text:
Most students wait until their final year to start building a career. Polaris students are doing it in Year 1.

₹1 Cr+ in stipends, 109 opportunities, 35 global open-source selections, and internships across 11 countries.

This isn’t a placement report. It’s what happens when you focus on proof of work from Day 1.

author: polariscampus
text:
What is the strongest tangible proof of coding competence in real-world scenarios?

Open Source it is. Which is strongly engraved into the culture of Polaris.

This year, 18 Polaris students became part of that culture through Google Summer of Code 2026.

And they’re not just contributing locally. They’re now working across open-source ecosystems spanning 9 countries, contributing to real-world systems in:
- cybersecurity
- healthcare & genomics
- developer infrastructure
- ⁠geospatial systems
- ⁠programming languages

Working alongside experienced mentors, building systems used by developers and organizations across the world.

But behind every selection is a completely different story.
While some students started with utmost clarity, some rebuilt from scratch after setbacks. Some learned by breaking things, fixing them, and trying again.
What connects all of them is simple:
They showed up consistently.
 They kept building.

And they contributed before they felt “ready.” That’s what o
